description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a rounded, bulging body and flat, circular ends. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each displaying a natural wood grain texture and subtle color variations. Two wide, dark metal hoops encircle the barrel, one near the top and one near the bottom, providing structural reinforcement and a visual accent. The wood appears slightly weathered, with visible grooves and knots, suggesting durability and traditional craftsmanship. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, with the wood grain running in concentric circles. There are no visible handles, spouts, or openings, and the barrel is fully enclosed.
description: A sturdy, rounded wooden barrel reinforced with two dark metal hoops and detailed wood grain texture. The barrel is fully enclosed with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded wooden staves and both metal hoops, with the wood grain and texture clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the wood's natural grain and a subtle marking on the top surface.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the curvature of the barrel and the even spacing of the metal hoops.
description_view_3: Another angled view highlighting the wood's vertical grain and the seamless integration of the metal hoops.
